name: VOD Review
description: Auxiliary esports VOD review surface for browsing a library of match recordings and annotating frames with coaching notes and timestamps.

page_briefs.vods: VOD library page. Top region renders a data-table listing recordings with columns for match title, opponent, date, map, duration, coach, and review status. Below, a content card-grid shows thumbnails with handle overlays, match scores, and play-count badges, giving visual access to the same library for quick browsing.
page_briefs.vod-detail: Single VOD review page. Main region hosts a vod-annotator with the video player, draw-on-frame annotation tools, timestamped comment threads, and a clip-marking tool for building review reels. Below, a timeline surfaces all annotations as pins along the match duration, letting the coach jump straight to flagged moments.
